questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from the blue hopper, rolls onto the fixed ramp_right at (3,1), continues to ramp_right at (4,2), ramp_right at (5,3), crossover at (6,4), then the solution ramps: ramp_left at (7,5), ramp_left at (6,6), ramp_right at (5,7), reaching the exit on the left side.

questions.question: In what order do balls exit the machine?
questions.answer: All 8 blue balls exit at the blue (left) exit. No balls are intercepted.

questions.question: How many total components are on the board (fixed + placed)?
questions.answer: There are 7 components total: 4 fixed components and 3 placed ramps.
